videos.headline: Oklahoma takes the punt 82 yards to the house
videos.description: Gavin Freeman returns the punt 82 yards for an Oklahoma TD.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma takes the punt 82 yards to the house) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Andrel Anthony makes a spectacular diving catch for Oklahoma
videos.description: Andrel Anthony dives and makes a spectacular snag to put the Sooners in great field position.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Andrel Anthony makes a spectacular diving catch for Oklahoma) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Drake Stoops takes the WR screen to the house for OU
videos.description: Drake Stoops finds pay dirt to put the Sooners on the board first.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Drake Stoops takes the WR screen to the house for OU) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Marcus Major punches it in to pad Oklahoma's lead
videos.description: Marcus Major plows into the end zone to give the Sooners a 20-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Marcus Major punches it in to pad Oklahoma's lead) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gavin Freeman finds pay dirt for a second time
videos.description: Gavin Freeman breaks the plane for his second touchdown of the game for OU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gavin Freeman finds pay dirt for a second time) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Gibson's incredible snag sets up an OU TD
videos.description: Jayden Gibson makes an incredible grab that sets up a 1-yard rushing touchdown for Tawee Walker.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jayden Gibson's incredible snag sets up an OU TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma goes up 42-0 on Dillon Gabriel's QB keeper
videos.description: Dillon Gabriel keeps it himself and finds the end zone to give Oklahoma a 42-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma goes up 42-0 on Dillon Gabriel's QB keeper) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tawee Walker muscles into the end zone for his 2nd TD
videos.description: Tawee Walker plows across the goal line to give the Sooners a 52-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tawee Walker muscles into the end zone for his 2nd TD) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jackson Arnold's rushing TD gives OU a 66-0 lead
videos.description: Jackson Arnold rumbles into the end zone to give the Sooners a 66-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jackson Arnold's rushing TD gives OU a 66-0 lead) 2023/09/02 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kalib Hicks scores Oklahoma's 10th TD of the game
videos.description: Kalib Hicks finds the corner dives into the end zone to give the Sooners a 73-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kalib Hicks scores Oklahoma's 10th TD of the game) 2023/09/02 ESHEET
